label: Heatwaves can now water your task list
items: New setting: on hot days Rhozly can create extra watering tasks automatically — one per area, covering the plants planted there. Find it under Head Gardener → Notifications → Weather actions (off by default; applies to the whole home).
It's careful about noise: if watering is already scheduled for an area today — by you or a routine — no extra task is created, and a long heatwave adds at most one task per area per day.
Your watering automations complete these tasks too, and rain still auto-completes them.
Plants that are planted but not in any area get a mention in the heatwave alert so they're not forgotten.
